subject: Update resources and traversal to use amsterdam
commit_message:
Update resources and traversal to use amsterdam

After the branch was cut these need to ensure
to use the amsterdam branch instead of master
Assumed that this is not the case since it
was originally not using the clone but took
the config files from aai-config and aai-data

Issue-ID: AAI-548
Change-Id: Icd1896fced0ba493f8bbd2cd314183e67b792492
Signed-off-by: Venkata Harish K Kajur <vk250x@att.com>

entries.message: Patch Set 1: Cherry Picked from branch amsterdam.

Patch Set 1:

Michael please post your result here. I’ll merge once confirmed to fix.
I’ll have limited access this week end, I’ll try to help with the merge but cannot so much more.
